mission.title: Diagnosis before treatment
mission.description: Acne, hair loss, rashes and lesions are medical concerns first. Dr. Paragas examines and diagnoses before any cosmetic or energy-based procedure is recommended.

mission.title: Evidence-based aesthetics
mission.description: Injectables, skin boosters and laser or energy-based devices are chosen to fit the diagnosis and skin type — not simply the latest trend.

mission.title: A calmer clinic experience
mission.description: The Lounge takes that same medical foundation and delivers it in a private, unhurried, boutique-style setting built around the patient.

locations.title: ParagasMed — Calasiao
locations.description: Midtown Tower, Calasiao, Pangasinan. General and medical dermatology alongside aesthetic and cosmetic procedures.

locations.title: Ortigas
locations.description: The Lounge Clinic Ortigas brings the same aesthetic dermatology and cosmetic services to Metro Manila patients.

locations.title: Civic Place, Alabang
locations.description: Civic Drive, Muntinlupa. Walk-in and appointment slots for laser, injectable and skin-quality treatments.
